title: taraxacum occidentale
intro: Taraxacum occidentale, also known as Western dandelion, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family Asteraceae. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its roots and leaves, which are used to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Taraxacum occidentale include its ability to support liver and kidney function, reduce inflammation, and act as a diuretic. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum occidentale include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal properties and health benefits.
